heading: Citation of chapter
label: 5849 Citation of chapter
text: This chapter may be cited as the “National Firearms Act” and any reference in any other provision of law to the “National Firearms Act” shall be held to refer to the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5849, , , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 203(g)(1)72 Stat. 1427Pub. L. 90–618Sept. 2, 1958

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 90–618, title II, § 20282 Stat. 1235Oct. 22, 1968“The amendments made by [enacting this chapter] shall be cited as the ‘National Firearms Act Amendments of 1968’.”section 201 of this title
